stemHtml: The operating principle of an electronic tachometer probe is to measure the…

options.a: rotation speed of an asynchronous motor energised by an alternator.
options.b: electromotive force produced by a dynamo or an alternator.
options.c: frequency of the sequence of electric impulses created by a notched wheel rotating in a magnetic field.
options.d: magnetic field produced by a dynamo or an alternator.
